scripts.ci:test: docker build -t vrt-runner . && docker run --rm --ipc=host -v "$(pwd)/playwright-report:/app/playwright-report" vrt-runner
scripts.ci:test:update: docker build -t vrt-runner . && docker run --rm --ipc=host -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:5173/ -v "$(pwd)/tests:/app/tests" vrt-runner npx playwright test --update-snapshots
